mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.status, o.total_price, o.created_at, u.user_id AS user_userId, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.created_at AS user_createdAt FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.status, o.total_price, o.created_at, u.user_id AS user_userId, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.created_at AS user_createdAt FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.user_id

SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.status, o.total_price, o.created_at, u.user_id AS user_userId, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.created_at AS user_createdAt FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, status, total_price, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{createdAt})
